title: dampiera tenuicaulis var. curvula
intro: Dampiera tenuicaulis var. curvula, also known as the curved-leaved dampiera, is a flowering plant in the family Goodeniaceae. It is native to the southwestern region of Western Australia, where it grows as a shrub or small tree. The plant has been traditionally used by indigenous Australians for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The curved-leaved dampiera can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas and tinctures, to alleviate respiratory issues and promote overall health, including reducing inflammation and fighting infections.
